title: LLMs
intro: Foundational model families grouped by licensing and accessibility. The appendix treats this as a curated snapshot rather than an exhaustive catalog.

items.name: GPT series
items.description: A series of powerful and widely used LLMs from OpenAI.
features: State-of-the-art performance across a wide range of natural language tasks.
Strong reasoning, coding, and creative text generation capabilities.
items.models: GPT-4, GPT-4o, GPT-5, o1, o3, and various fine-tuned versions.
items.license: Proprietary, accessible via a paid API.

items.name: Claude series
items.description: A family of conversational AI models from Anthropic focused on safety and helpful responses.
features: Large context windows for processing and analyzing long documents.
Strong performance in conversational and text-processing tasks.
Emphasis on constitutional AI and safety.
items.license: Proprietary, accessible via a paid API.

items.name: Gemini series
items.description: A family of multimodal LLMs developed by Google DeepMind.
features: Native multimodal capabilities across text, images, audio, video, and code.
Substantial context windows reaching up to 1 million tokens in Gemini 1.5 models.
items.models: Gemini Ultra, Gemini Pro, Gemini Flash, and Gemini Nano across 1.0, 1.5, and 2.0 generations.

items.name: Gemma
items.description: A family of lightweight, state-of-the-art open models from Google.
features: Strong focus on responsible AI development.

items.name: Llama
items.description: A family of open-weight LLMs from Meta.
features: Llama 4 introduces a mixture-of-experts architecture and multimodal support.
Very long context windows, including up to 10 million tokens in Llama 4 Scout.

items.name: DeepSeek
items.description: High-performance, cost-efficient LLMs with a strong focus on coding and reasoning.
features: Advanced reasoning and efficient hardware utilization.
Open-weight models that can be run locally.
items.models: DeepSeek-V3, DeepSeek-R1, DeepSeek-VL2, DeepSeek-Coder, and DeepSeek-Math.

items.name: Mistral AI
items.description: AI startup that develops a range of open-weight and proprietary models.
features: Some models are released under Apache 2.0 or other specific licenses.
Proprietary models are accessible via a paid API.
items.models: Mistral 7B, Mistral 8x7B, Mistral Small, Mistral Medium, and Mistral Large.

items.name: Qwen
items.description: A comprehensive family of LLMs from Alibaba Cloud.
features: Many models are released under Apache 2.0.
